title: Features | PostPlanify
h1: Every feature you need to grow on social.
h2: Ready to put it all together?
bodyText: PostPlanify Features Integrations Resources Pricing What's New? Login Try for free Schedule a demo All the tools. One platform. Every feature you need to grow on social. From a unified content calendar to AI-powered captions, white-label reports to team workflows — explore every PostPlanify feature below. Start free View pricing Content Calendar Plan, edit, and reschedule across all your platforms from one drag-and-drop calendar. Advanced Analytics Track performance, engagement, and growth across all 10 platforms. Historical trends included. Social Inbox All your comments + DMs in one place. Reply, label, assign, and let AI help you respond faster. Team Collaboration Invite teammates and clients into one workspace with shared calendar, approvals, and flat pricing. AI Assistant Generate captions, create images, and improve your content with the built-in AI assistant. White-label Reports Every report carries your brand. Trend charts from all 10 platforms baked in. Share or download. Media Library Upload once, reuse everywhere. Smart tagging, fast search, and Bunny-powered CDN delivery. Link in Bio A polished, branded landing page for every platform — drag, drop, publish. Automation Auto-publish, auto-respond, recycle evergreen posts. Set it once, let it run. AI Captions & Images Generate platform-perfect captions and on-brand images in seconds. Developer API Build on top of PostPlanify. REST endpoints for posts, accounts, analytics, and webhooks. Ready to put it all together? Try PostPlanify free for 14 days. No credit card required. Get started PostPlanify Social media management for agencies, teams and businesses.
